items.title: On Evaluating Abstraction and Analogy in Humans and Machines
items.author: Melanie Mitchell
items.content: <article>Current Directions in Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. This article reviews two case studies in which AI systems were evaluated for abstraction and analogy-making capabilities and compared with those of humans. These studies illustrate how AI systems should be evaluated not only for accuracy on benchmark ...</article>
